basic_details.job_title: IIT Bhilai Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Assistant Professor, Professor and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Bhilai (IIT Bhilai)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Bhilai (IIT Bhilai) Assistant Professor (Grade-II), Assistant Professor (Grade-I), Associate Professor, Professor Notification 2026 has been released on the official website . Candidates have been announced through the IIT Bhilai Faculty Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Assistant Professor (Grade-II): Maximum age is 35 years. Assistant Professor (Grade-I): Maximum age is 35 years. Associate Professor: Maximum age is 45 years. Professor: Maximum age is 55 years.

qualification.details: Assistant Professor (Grade-II): Ph.D. in a relevant area with first class or equivalent grades at the preceding degree and with consistently good academic record throughout. Candidates with less than 3 years of post-Ph.D. experience may also be considered on a contractual position. Assistant Professor (Grade-I): Ph.D. in a relevant area with first class or equivalent grades at the preceding degree and with consistently good academic record throughout. Candidates must have at least three years of relevant teaching/research/industrial experience. Candidates with less than 3 years of post-Ph.D. experience may be considered for a contractual position of Assistant Professor Grade II with appropriate pay based on the number of years of post-doctoral experience. Associate Professor: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent grades at the preceding degree in the appropriate branch with a very good academic record throughout. A minimum of six years' teaching/industry/research experience of which 3 years should be at the level of Assistant Professor (Grade-I), Senior Scientific. Professor: Ph.D. with first class or equivalent grades at the preceding degree in the appropriate branch with a very good academic record throughout. A minimum of 10 years post-Ph.D teaching/ research/ professional experience of which at least 04 years should be at the level of Associate Professor in IITs, IISC, IISERS, IIMS or at an equivalent level in any other Indian/Foreign Universities/Institutions of comparable level. The candidate should have demonstrated leadership in research in a specific area, with an excellent record of publications in reputed journals and conferences and should have graduated Ph.D students. Candidates should also have demonstrated excellent teaching abilities at higher educational institutions. It is desirable that the candidate has carried out laboratory development/course development/ technology development/ innovative work leading to patents and has generated sufficient funding for research. It is also desirable that the candidate has external recognition in the area of specialization. Teaching and Ph.D guidance requirements may be relaxed for candidates from research labs if they have an exceptional research record.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Level 10 to 14A with corresponding pay scales.
salary_details.details: Assistant Professor (Grade-II): Level 10 to Level 11 (₹70,900 - ₹75,300 to ₹73,100 - ₹75,300) Assistant Professor (Grade-I): Level 12 (₹1,01,500 - ₹1,67,400) Associate Professor: Level 13A2 (₹1,39,600 - ₹2,11,300) Professor: Level 14A (₹1,59,100 - ₹2,20,200)

selection_process: Scrutiny of applications Shortlisting based on academic record
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Bhilai Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 14-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Bhilai to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Bhilai Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the IIT Bhilai faculty positions is 14th May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the different faculty positions available at IIT Bhilai?
faq.answer: IIT Bhilai is recruiting for Assistant Professor (Grade-II), Assistant Professor (Grade-I), Associate Professor, and Professor positions across various departments.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum educational qualification required for these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum educational qualification for all the advertised faculty positions is a Ph.D. in a relevant area with first-class or equivalent grades at the preceding degree and a consistently good academic record.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age limit for the IIT Bhilai faculty recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, there are age limits for each post: Assistant Professor (Grade-II & Grade-I) below 35 years, Associate Professor below 45 years, and Professor below 55 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for IIT Bhilai faculty positions?
faq.answer: All eligible candidates must apply online through the official IIT Bhilai website. Offline applications will not be accepted.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the recruited faculty members?
faq.answer: The salary is offered as per the Pay Level 10 to 14A of the 7th Central Pay Commission, with specific pay scales varying for each post.

faq.question: Q7. How will candidates be selected for the faculty positions?
faq.answer: The selection process involves scrutiny of applications, shortlisting based on academic record, research quality, and experience, followed by a seminar and interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to check the detailed advertisement for confirmation.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF for IIT Bhilai Faculty Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article or directly from the IIT Bhilai official website.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of IIT Bhilai?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Bhilai is located in Bhilai, Chhattisgarh, with the pincode 491002.
